tools_list_raw:
event: message
data: {"result":{"tools":[{"name":"set_light","description":"Включить/выключить свет. state=on|off.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"device_id":{"type":"string","enum":["bright_room_light","low_room_light","table_light","kitchen_light","toilet_light","bathroom_light","corridor_light"]},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["on","off"]}},"required":["device_id","state"]}},{"name":"set_dimmer","description":"Яркость ночника 0..100 (0=выкл).","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"device_id":{"type":"string","enum":["night_light"]},"brightness":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"maximum":100}},"required":["device_id","brightness"]}},{"name":"set_climate","description":"Кондиционер: число (\"22\") или \"off\".","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"device_id":{"type":"string","enum":["room_ac"]},"temperature":{"type":"string"}},"required":["device_id","temperature"]}},{"name":"set_switch","description":"Вкл/выкл устройство (не свет). state=on|off.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"device_id":{"type":"string","enum":["monitors"]},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["on","off"]}},"required":["device_id","state"]}},{"name":"set_lock","description":"Замок: action=lock|unlock.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"device_id":{"type":"string","enum":["main_lock"]},"action":{"type":"string","enum":["lock","unlock"]}},"required":["device_id","action"]}},{"name":"set_scene","description":"Сцена: night|morning.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"scene":{"type":"string","enum":["night","morning"]}},"required":["scene"]}}]},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2}
